title: centaurea stenocephala
intro: Centaurea stenocephala, also known as knapweed or centaurea, is a perennial herb in the sunflower family native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its distinctive flower head and bitter taste. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Centaurea stenocephala include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting digestive health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Centaurea stenocephala can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
